reviews.review_description: Great fun, challenging but you know you'll get through after a few tries. Only criticism is that my gamepad controller only works if I play one of the first levels first before going into where I left off - bit strange!  If you're thinking of buying this, go for it - you won't be disappointed:-)
This game is so much fun and pretty darn emersive! I love this game and I highly recommend it!
Brilliant game. No problems on my s7 edge.

This is so much fun, superb gameplay, nice music and definitely worth to buy. Really welldone. 

I wondered why I had never bought this game yet. I was looking into old games list to find best games and got it. I just noticed that your team had released another series for Viral, I will buy that too for sure.

I'm surprised at how many levels this game has. The amount of levels totally makes it worth it! It makes it feel like a console game, instead of a VR demo, like most games that have too few levels. 

My only issue is that sometimes the game moves you through tiny holes that feel no wider than your shoulders. Between the motion and the tight spaces, it can get a bit claustrophobic or nauseating. But these are merely sequences between levels, and it doesn't happen all the time. Once you're in a level, it opens up and everything feels fine. 

Otherwise, the game play is great, it's fun, and it seems like you'll never finish because there are so many levels. The sheer quantity of levels overcomes those downsides. Good game! Totally worth it, given the price.

This is one of the few vr games that I couldn't stop playing until I beat it. The graphics aren't the best and it's glitchy at times but a TON of fun. The second that it starts to get boring, something new and more difficult is introduced. Huge thumbs up on this game. SPOILER: My only complaint is that I wished the last boss was the computer that is talking to you throughout the game. As if she was bad the whole time

reviews.review_title: Viral will make you love VR even more.
reviews.review_description: This game is really fun, challenge, addictive and everyone in the family can enjoy this game.  and funny. Stages designs is great you can feel the VR experience. With 50 stages of game to enjoy. This game is worth the money. Love it.

reviews.review_title: Perhaps the best VR game ever!!!!!

reviews.review_description: except good enough to say it

reviews.review_title: My fav game right now on the gear vr
reviews.review_description: The screens shots font do it justice. This game made me feel a new sense of immersion.  The environments are amazingly done. You really feel like you're inside these little compartments.  The physics is realistic.  I just wish the bad guys weren't so blocky. Still, this is an awesome vr experience.
I love this game so much and its so addicting I play it everytime I use my Gear VR which is alot thanks to this game!!
There are games that literally make you feel you're in there. From all the games I've downloaded here, THIS one has to be one of the most immersive ones.

I like what i see so far. The general concept is you shoot little balls at varying angles and speeds to navigate levels and destroy baddies. It is fun to try and get a best score on each level, and I usually try to get a decent spot on the leaderboard. I love the leaderboard since i am a competitive person. Only bad part is i am a bit confused on how the scoring works, and i dont see it explained anywhere in game. Pretty good 3d and immersion for this game. Not sure why some games seem more 3d or immersive, but that is always a plus for me.
